a.xlink:title: Get samples per channel (time dimension only).
Advance current positions by specified frames per channel, with optional looping.
Advance current positions by a number of frames, with optional looping.
Extract one block of frames into container processed_data[0].
Store dimension and layout metadata from the container.
Validate the container's structure and output configuration.
Advance the read position by a specified amount.
Organize container data into structured regions.
Process the current region or block of data.
Read data sequentially from the current position.
Attach this processor to a signal source container.
Construct a region organization processor for a given container.
Attach the processor to a signal source container.
Set the output buffer size (shape) for each processing call.
